patterns.pattern: ^As (\w+) speaks a terrible word of power, the magical shield surrounding (.+) shatters into prismatic shards\.$
^Directing (your) power against the magical shield surrounding (.+), you intone, "Nakail"\.$
^(\w+) lays into (.+) with a terrible blow from .+\.$
^(You) lay into (.+) with a vicious blow from .+\.$
^(\w+) lashes out with a swift, reaping blow at (.+)\.$
^(You) unleash a vicious reaping blow at (.+) with .+\.$
^(Your) shadow leaps for (.+), hammering \w+ shield in a silent frenzy that causes it to explode in a shower of prismatic shards\.$

^The shadow of (\w+) suddenly comes alive, leaping forward to hammer at the magical shield surrounding (.+) in a silent frenzy of blows\. \w+ protection lasts mere moments before exploding in a shower of prismatic shards\.$
^(.+) is not surrounded by a magical shield\.$
